data.title: Binance Market Update (2025-02-21)
data.description:
The global cryptocurrency market cap now stands at $3.20T, up by 1.44% over the last day, according to CoinMarketCap data.

Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading between $96,799 and $98,897 over the past 24 hours. As of 09:30 AM (UTC) today, BTC is trading at $98,375, up by 1.21%.

Most major cryptocurrencies by market cap are trading mixed. Market outperformers include KAITO, BNX, and COOKIE, up by 1626%, 25%, and 22%, respectively.

Market movers:

ETH: $2795.79 (+2.42%)

XRP: $2.6746 (-1.04%)

BNB: $657.8 (+1.54%)

SOL: $178.53 (+3.89%)

DOGE: $0.25613 (+1.18%)

ADA: $0.8082 (+2.75%)

TRX: $0.2489 (+4.49%)

TRUMP: $17.06 (+1.55%)

WBTC: $98236.9 (+1.21%)

LINK: $18.54 (+3.06%)

Top gainers on Binance:

KAITO/USDT (+1626%)

BNX/USDT (+25%)

COOKIE/USDT (+22%)

data.title: Musk denounces X platform Community Notes feature for malicious manipulation
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Musk posted on the X platform, citing relevant news, "Community Notes is increasingly being manipulated by the government and traditional media. We are working hard to solve this problem. The polls about his own support rate controlled by Zelensky are absolutely not credible."

data.title: Musk Criticizes Manipulation Of Community Notes On Social Media
data.description: According to Odaily, Elon Musk recently expressed concerns on the X platform about the manipulation of Community Notes by governments and traditional media. Musk stated that efforts are underway to address this issue. He also questioned the credibility of opinion polls controlled by Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky regarding his own approval ratings.

data.title: Solana Surpasses 180 USDT With Significant Daily Increase
data.description: According to Odaily, the cryptocurrency Solana (SOL) has surpassed the 180 USDT mark, currently trading at 180.01 USDT. This marks a 24-hour increase of 4.75%.

data.title: Blockchain Investigator ZachXBT Closes Direct Messaging Channels
data.description: According to Odaily, blockchain investigator ZachXBT announced on his personal Telegram channel that he has closed all direct messaging channels due to receiving numerous disturbances on X/Twitter. Users are advised to remain cautious and be aware of potential scams.

data.title: ZachXBT to Disable Direct Messages on Twitter
data.description: According to PANews, blockchain investigator ZachXBT announced on his Telegram channel that he will be disabling direct messages on X/Twitter in the coming weeks. This decision comes as a response to the frequent time-wasting messages he receives. As a result, the community will no longer be able to contact him through this platform. Users are advised to be cautious and avoid falling victim to scams.

data.title: Ethereum Surpasses $2800 With Notable Increase
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Ethereum has experienced a significant rise, surpassing the $2800 mark. As of February 21, the cryptocurrency is currently priced at $2824, reflecting a 24-hour increase of 3.63%.

data.title: Kanye West plans to launch YZY tokens, with 70% of the tokens held by him
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Coindesk, according to three people familiar with the matter, Kanye West plans to launch the YZY token, which is designed to help him bypass online platforms such as Shopify that have cut off cooperation due to his remarks. It is understood that 70% of the token will be reserved for Kanye personally to commemorate his Yeezy clothing brand; 10% will be used for liquidity supply, and 20% will be allocated to investors. In addition, YZY will become the official currency of Yeezy and will be accepted as a payment method on his website.
Earlier news, Kanye had rejected a hacker's $2 million Meme coin scam invitation and said that he would not release Meme coins.
Odaily Planet Daily reminds that the Meme coin market is risky, please be careful to distinguish.

data.title: Scam Sniffer warns that fake "relay bridge" phishing websites appear in Google ads
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Scam Sniffer posted on the X platform that three fake "Relay Bridge" phishing websites appeared in the Google search interface ads. Please do not interact with any ads, bookmark compliant websites, and report phishing websites.

data.title: Google Ads Display Fake Relay Bridge Phishing Sites
data.description: According to Odaily, Scam Sniffer has issued a warning on the X platform about the presence of three fraudulent 'Relay Bridge' phishing websites appearing in Google search advertisements. Users are advised to avoid interacting with any advertisements and to bookmark legitimate websites while reporting any phishing sites encountered.
